auth.signInSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access your account
auth.createAccountSubtitle: Start tracking your utility consumption today

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters long
validation.passwordRules: Password must be at least 6 characters long and include at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one digit

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noRecentEntries: No entries recorded yet. Start tracking your utility consumption.

addEntry.title: Add Entry
addEntry.noMeters: No meters found. Create a section and meter in Settings first.
addEntry.noMetersInSection: No meters in this section. Add one in Settings.
addEntry.firstReadingInfo: This is the first reading for this meter. Enter the current value — usage will start from the next entry.

validation.usagePositive: Usage amount must be greater than 0
validation.meterReadingNonNegative: Meter reading must be 0 or greater
validation.unitPricePositive: Unit price must be 0 or greater
validation.endDateBeforeStart: End date must be on or after start date

entries.title: Utility Entries
entries.noEntries: No entries recorded yet. Start tracking your utility consumption.
entries.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this entry? This action cannot be undone.

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.noData: No data available yet. Add entries to see your statistics.
statistics.spendingOverTimeDesc: Monthly cost trend across all utilities
statistics.spendingByCategoryDesc: Total cost breakdown per utility type
statistics.noMonthlyData: Not enough data for a time trend yet.

statisticsDetail.title: {{type}} Details
statisticsDetail.noData: No data available for this utility type. Add entries to see the breakdown.
statisticsDetail.dailyBreakdownDesc: Cost per day for the selected month

emptyMeter.heading: No data
emptyMeter.body: No entries recorded for this meter yet.

emptySection.heading: No entries yet
emptySection.body: Add your first entry to see statistics here.

statisticsDetail.errorLoad: Could not load statistics. Check your connection and try again.

sections.loadErrorHint: Check your connection and try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.currencyDescription: Choose your preferred display currency. Costs are converted from EUR using current exchange rates.
settings.logoutDescription: End your current session and return to the login screen.

sections.title: Sections & Meters
sections.description: Manage your utility sections and meters.
sections.name: Name
sections.deleteSectionMessage: This will permanently delete this section and all its data. This cannot be undone.
sections.deleteMeterMessage: Delete {{name}}? This will permanently remove all entries for this meter.
sections.noSectionsHint: Add your first section to start tracking utilities.
sections.saveError: Failed to save. Please try again.
sections.renameError: Failed to rename meter. Your change was reverted.
